testCases.title: Guest Checkout - Happy Path
testCases.notes: N/A — needs chrome browser per CSV (headlessui delivery/payment selectors require playwright-chrome). Already executed on prior run REG-2026-05-04-0756.

testCases.title: Guest Checkout - New Address Entry
testCases.notes: PARTIAL VERIFICATION: blank New Address modal renders for guest (no pre-populated/saved address — confirmed via CHK-066). All required text fields accept manual input (First/Last name, Email, ZIP, City, Address). Form-level CREATE button is disabled until all required fields satisfied. Full flow ('shipping methods calculate based on entered address') BLOCKED on Firefox: the Country combobox (headlessui pattern) does not respond to programmatic clicks/keyboard from Firefox MCP — same limitation that forces CHK-014/017/018/020/067/068 onto chrome. Defer end-to-end verification to chrome retest of CHK-014.

testCases.title: Guest Checkout - Field Validation
testCases.notes: Email format validation engages on blur. Empty submission blocked by disabled CREATE button (form-level guard). Invalid format 'notanemail' triggers inline error 'Enter a valid email address, e.g. johndoe@gmail.com' with red field outline. Valid email 'test@example.com' clears the error. Per-field inline validation pattern confirmed for required fields. CREATE remains disabled until all required fields satisfied (acts as form-level submit guard preventing advance with errors).

testCases.title: Guest Checkout - Register After Purchase and Order Linked
testCases.notes: N/A — needs chrome browser per CSV (depends on CHK-014 chrome flow).

testCases.title: Guest Checkout - Disabled When Anonymous Users Not Allowed
testCases.notes: N/A — feature not applicable in QA per CSV (anonymousUsersAllowed=false store variant not configured in shared QA environment).

testCases.title: Checkout Validation - Invalid Email Format
testCases.failedAssertion: [DOM] Email format error rendered for each invalid pattern — 'user@domain' (no TLD) is accepted with no error
testCases.notes: Two of three invalid patterns correctly rejected: 'notanemail' (no @) → error; 'user@' (trailing @) → error. But 'user@domain' (no TLD) is accepted without error, contradicting the test step explicitly asking 'Verify error shown'. Many production validators allow 'user@hostname' as syntactically valid SMTP (e.g. root@localhost), so this may be intentional regex laxity rather than a defect. Filing preliminary bug BUG-012-001 for the test-spec deviation; defer triage to qa-testing-expert.

testCases.title: Guest Checkout - No Saved Addresses Available
testCases.notes: Cart page as anonymous user shows 'Ship to: Add new address' header link only — no saved-address selector or dropdown is visible. Clicking opens 'New address' modal with blank form (First name, Last name, Email, Phone, Country, ZIP, State, City, Address — all empty). No saved addresses from prior sessions leak into guest form. PLACE ORDER button remains disabled with notice 'Complete all required information to proceed' until address committed. Manual entry is the only option. No console errors, no 4xx/5xx network calls during the flow.

testCases.title: Guest Checkout - Order Confirmation Without Order History Link
testCases.notes: N/A — needs chrome browser per CSV (depends on CHK-014 chrome flow).

testCases.title: Guest Checkout - Same Email as Existing Account
testCases.notes: N/A — needs chrome browser per CSV (depends on CHK-014 chrome flow + headlessui selectors).

bugs.title: Address-form email validator accepts 'user@domain' without TLD
bugs.failedAssertion: [DOM] Email format error rendered for each invalid pattern — 'user@domain' (no TLD) accepted
bugs.stepsToReproduce:
1. Navigate to https://vcst-qa-storefront.govirto.com/cart as anonymous user with cart items
2. Click 'Ship to: Add new address' header link to open New address modal
3. Type 'user@domain' (no TLD) into Email field
4. Press Tab to blur
bugs.expected: Inline error 'Enter a valid email address, e.g. johndoe@gmail.com' shown (per CHK-029 step explicitly asking 'Verify error shown' for this input)
bugs.actual: No error shown — field accepts 'user@domain' without complaint, no red outline, no inline message
bugs.notes: Many SMTP-strict validators accept 'user@hostname' as valid (e.g. root@localhost is RFC-valid). This may be intentional regex laxity rather than a defect. Confirmed only 'no @' and 'trailing @' patterns are rejected; missing-TLD patterns pass. Defer triage to qa-testing-expert.

notes: RETRY of suite started 2026-05-05T08:50:25Z (aborted by quota at 7 min, 0 cases executed). Storefront uses single-page cart (no separate /checkout/email step) — modal-based address entry includes email field. 6 cases marked SKIPPED — chrome browser required (CHK-014/017/018/020/067/068, headlessui selectors not interactive on Firefox MCP). 2 cases marked SKIPPED per CSV — feature not implemented (CHK-016) / not applicable in QA (CHK-021). 1 case marked SKIPPED on Firefox — CHK-015 form rendering verified but full submission blocked by Country combobox (same headlessui limitation). Executed on Firefox: CHK-019 PASS, CHK-029 FAIL (regex laxity for missing TLD, BUG-012-001 filed), CHK-066 PASS. Pass rate over 4 attempted-runnable cases (CHK-015/019/029/066): 2/3 actually run = 66.7%; over 12 total = 16.7%. Cross-reference: BUG-041-001 (P0) double-click and BUG-002-001 (Crit) zero-price already filed in earlier suites — not refiled here.
